source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist or Inter for English product UI with Noto Sans JP / Hiragino Sans guidance for Japanese labels, compact numeric rhythm, and clear monitoring hierarchy.
layout: Dense 8px grids, 8px radii, translucent shell cards, antenna-like separators, silver data borders, and chart-heavy polar monitoring surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent Krill swarm motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Krill transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated Antarctic krill swarm motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A compact cluster of Antarctic krill (Euphausia superba): one larger lead krill and a few smaller krill silhouettes arranged like a coordinated swarm. Accurate crustacean anatomy, translucent rose-pink carapace, pale blue polar-water internal tones, silver reflective micro highlights, black bead eyes, fine antennae, segmented abdomen, delicate swimmerets. Suggest translucency with opaque painted color and internal highlights; keep every visible krill pixel solid enough for clean background removal.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; horizontal drifting swarm shape, no cropping, crisp separated edges.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving translucent pink, blue water tones, silver shimmer, and fine shell detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 or green anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no ocean background, no water bubbles, no plankton field, no rocks, no ice landscape, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no text, no watermark, no props, no decorative frame.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 16:9 light-mode design-system board titled exactly "Morphous Krill" with subtitle "Krill Swarm Metrics System - Light Mode". It must be a production-quality shadcn/tweakcn-compatible UI system derived from the previously generated Antarctic krill swarm motif: translucent rose-pink shells, pale blue polar water tones, silver shimmer, black bead eyes, fine antennae, segmented swimmerets, and coordinated swarm movement.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160 wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source. Use a precise grid and large readable labels; avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible section headings, all present and legible: Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Forms, Tables, Command / Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Sample Usage.
Palette section: Polar Ice, Shell Pink, Krill Rose, Blue Water, Silver Plankton, Deep Current, Midnight Eye, Drift Gray, Signal Coral. Show hex chips and semantic roles.
Tokens section: clearly labeled shadcn/tweakcn chips for bg, fg, card, primary, primary-fg, secondary, muted, accent, border, input, ring, chart-1, chart-2, chart-3, sidebar, destructive.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, charts, loading, empty, error, success.
Dashboard/data: show swarm metrics such as Swarm Density, Migration Depth, Biomass Index, Polar Current, and Plankton Flow with clean bar/line/donut charts.
Typography: English guidance using Geist or Inter; Japanese guidance using Noto Sans JP / Hiragino Sans with short sample labels such as 群れ密度, 深度, バイオマス, 観測. Use compact numerics for dashboards.
Style details: light polar-ice background, translucent card layers, 8px radii, thin silver borders, rose-pink primary actions, blue-water secondary states, silver focus rings, tiny antenna-like dividers, restrained shell-speckle texture, dense operational layout for repeated monitoring work.
Color constraints: use only motif-derived translucent pink, rose, blue water, silver, black eye, deep ocean, polar ice, and coral error. Avoid generic purple gradients, beige/brown dominance, neon colors, unrelated saturated colors, random logos, watermark, and unreadable microtext.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 16:9 dark-mode design-system board titled exactly "Morphous Krill" with subtitle "Dark Mode". It must feel like the same system translated from the light board: krill swarm metrics, precise shadcn/tweakcn UI, translucent rose-pink krill shells, pale blue polar water tones, silver shimmer, black bead eyes, segmented swarm movement, and operational ocean monitoring.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160 wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source. Use a precise grid and large readable labels; avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible section headings, all present and legible: Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Forms, Tables, Command / Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Sample Usage.
Palette section: Polar Ink, Abyss Current, Deep Current, Shell Pink, Krill Rose, Blue Water, Silver Plankton, Ice Glow, Drift Gray, Signal Coral. Show hex chips and semantic roles.
Tokens section: clearly labeled shadcn/tweakcn semantic token chips for bg, fg, card, primary, primary-fg, secondary, muted, accent, border, input, ring, chart-1, chart-2, chart-3, sidebar, destructive.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, charts, loading, empty, error, success.
Dashboard/data: show swarm metrics such as Swarm Density, Migration Depth, Biomass Index, Polar Current, and Plankton Flow with clean bar/line/donut charts.
Typography: English guidance using Geist or Inter; Japanese guidance using Noto Sans JP / Hiragino Sans with short sample labels such as 群れ密度, 深度, バイオマス, 観測. Use compact numerics for dashboards.
Visual details: dark polar-ocean background from deep current blues and black eye tones, elevated cards in abyss ink, foreground from ice glow, rose-pink primary actions, blue-water secondary states, silver rings and borders, subtle shell-speckle texture, antenna-like dividers, calm luminous chart colors, exact 8px radius on cards and controls.
Color constraints: use only motif-derived deep ocean, midnight eye, translucent pink, rose, blue water, silver, polar ice, and coral error. Avoid neon colors, pure black flatness, generic purple gradients, unrelated saturated colors, random logos, watermark, and unreadable microtext.
